text: Hello sir, I need to make a fresh intro (after being inactive for a long time then migrating here from using matrix), but I saw you were an architect - I'm a licensed architect (and professor) in the states who also develops some digital tools. Anyway - I wanted to say hello before your intro slipped above the fold!
